offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, frequent discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We provide vendor invoice reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: Frequent discrepancies in vendor invoices lead to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among sellers
try_it: Let users try manual entry and weekly discrepancy reports
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
